why then does Adonijah reign?", "resource-id": "com.bestweatherfor.bibleoffline_pt_ra:id/listview", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.z", "bounds": [0, 373, 1440, 1178], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1 Kings 1.17 - And she said to him, My lord, thou hast sworn by Jehovah thy God to thy handmaid, [saying,] Solomon thy son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne.", "resource-id": "com.bestweatherfor.bibleoffline_pt_ra:id/listview", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.z", "bounds": [0, 1182, 1440, 1884], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1 Kings 1.19 - And he has sacrificed oxen and fatted cattle and sheep in abundance, and has invited all the sons of the king and Abiathar the priest and Joab the captain of the host; but Solomon thy servant has he not invited.", "resource-id": "com.bestweatherfor.bibleoffline_pt_ra:id/listview", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.z", "bounds": [0, 1888, 1440, 2392], "componentLabel": "Text"}]}
